original_abstract:
The concept of the "Smart Classroom" has evolved significantly, reflecting the sophisticated technological advancements now woven into modern educational environments. Driven by the need for more efficient, creative, and flexible learning spaces that support both in-person and remote engagement, there is a growing integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and intelligent systems within the classroom. This paper explores the intersection of AI and education through a comprehensive literature review of smart classroom technologies, with a specific focus on emerging AI-driven innovations. 

We examine key technologies designed to streamline classroom management, enhance environmental comfort, provide sophisticated teaching aids, and automate student performance assessment. Beyond presenting these technological milestones, we analyze the specific role of AI in these systems to illustrate its transformative impact on the educational experience. To provide a balanced perspective, we conduct a SWOT analysis to identify the strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, and threats associated with adopting AI in these settings. Finally, we discuss future perspectives and the inherent challenges of deploying AI-based techniques in schools. This survey serves as a bridge between two worlds: providing educators with a clear understanding of AI's potential and limitations, while offering AI professionals insights into the unique challenges and requirements of designing systems for the educational sector.
humanized_abstract:
The concept of the term “Smart Classroom” has undergone drastic transformations, as we see various technological advancements incorporated into the present-day educational environment. The present-day education, on the one hand, requires more effective, innovative and adaptable learning spaces that can meet the varied needs of learners by facilitating on-site and remote learning. As such, there is a clear trend towards integrating Artificial Intelligence (AI) and smart technologies in classrooms. Based on a thorough literature review of various smart classroom technologies, this study examines the applications of AI in smart classroom environments and emerging trends in related fields.

A plethora of solutions have been proposed in the context of Smart Classroom to deal with the complexities of teacher’s administration, comfort, pedagogical tools, and assessment of students’ performance. We discuss several key technological achievements that deal with the solutions of managing smart classrooms efficiently, improving the comfort, providing rich teaching aids and automatic assessment of students’ performance etc. by explaining the role of AI and by taking the counter view of the technologies by performing a through SWOT analysis. Finally, we also present future directions along with challenges of integrating AI-based solutions for Schools. This survey aims at bridging the Educators-Technologists gap; it aims at doing a comprehensive survey of AI and its scope and the challenges of implementing it in educational sector which will bridge the existing gap between Educators and technologists, and vice versa.
